programme.title: Football : Ligue 2 BKT
programme.desc: Dernier de Ligue 2 à la clôture de la 20e journée, Bastia reçoit le leader troyen. Auteurs d'une première partie de saison difficile, les Bastiais espèrent remonter la pente en 2026 et se sauver. Mais face à eux se dresse Tawfik Bentayeb, l'un des meilleurs buteurs du championnat, et leader de l'attaque troyenne.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Maya Yoshida quietly became one of the Premier League's most dependable defenders during his years at Southampton, but his influence reached far beyond the pitch. In this episode, we look back at Yoshida's journey from Japan to England's top-flight, his role as a leader for club and country, and the cultural bridge he helped build along the way.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2015/2016 (LEI)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: After watching their already relegated side lose to the Invincibles on the last day of the 2003/4 Premier League season, some Leicester City fans stayed behind to watch Arsenal lift the trophy at Highbury. Those fans endured ten years in the wilderness, only for Leicester to return to the big time and embark on a rollercoaster couple of years.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Newcastle United are a team on the rise under Eddie Howe; a manager quietly rewriting the modern history of the club. With exclusive access and interviews from inside St. James' Park, we uncover the transformation Howe has led, from stabilising the team to delivering silverware and reigniting belief on Tyneside. As the Magpies set their sights on even greater heights, we ask just how far he can ta

programme.title: MCI v NEW
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2015/2016 season.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We delve into the remarkable story of Henrik Larsson, tracing how a young talent from Sweden rose to become one of football's most celebrated forwards. Through candid interviews, Larsson reflects on the work ethic, determination and sharp footballing intelligence that powered his career across Europe and on the international stage.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE SCANDINAVIAN STARS
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to the finest Scandinavian football legends, including Peter Schmeichel, Tore Andre Flo, Eidur Guðjohnsen, Freddie Ljungberg, Antti Niemi and more.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2010/2011 (MNU)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: SUN v FUL
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2010/2011 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We join Regis Le Bris as he charts his meteoric journey from the training pitches of France to the dugout at Sunderland, where he masterminded an unlikely charge to the Premier League. Le Bris reflects on the philosophy and resilience that helped his side punch far above their weight. We also travel back to France to uncover the formative experiences and influences that shaped one of football's mo

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We peel back the layers on the Premier League's most iconic managerial rivalries; battles that shaped eras, defined clubs, and captivated fans around the world. From the fierce mind games between Arsene Wenger and Sir Alex Ferguson, to the emotional explosion of Kevin Keegan's title-chasing Newcastle. From the simmering tension and touchline clashes of Mourinho vs. Wenger, to the tactical chess ma

programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: Join Togo and African football icon Emmanuel Adebayor as he relives his top 10 Premier League moments. From iconic goals to unforgettable rivalries, this inspiring and entertaining show is packed with candid insights, untold stories, and the passion that defined his career.

programme.title: TOT v ARS
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2004/2005 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We reflect on the rapid rise of Micky van de Ven, tracing his journey from a promising young defender in the Netherlands to becoming one of the Premier League's most electrifying modern centrebacks. We sit down with van de Ven to explore the resilience, mentality and sheer speed, on and off the pitch that have defined his ascent.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: Over a nine season spell in the Premier League, Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink etched his name into footballing folklore as one of the most dynamic goalscorers in the competition's history. Fourth all time in Premier League goals for Chelsea, Hasselbaink's iconic freekicks and powerful finishes have seen him score some of the League's most memorable goals.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: From the training grounds of La Masia, to Stamford Bridge - Marc Cucurella's journey to the top of World Football is a story of self belief and overcomiong adversity. One of the game's great character's - Cucurella grew up a Barcelona fan, and a graduate of their esteemed academy but only made one first team appearace for his childhood club.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We delve into the remarkable journey of Sunderland AFC; a club defined by its dramatic highs and painful lows. From their proud top-flight legacy to the heartbreak of consecutive relegations, Sunderland's story is one of resilience, identity, and unbreakable community spirit. Now, under the leadership of new head coach Regis Le Bris, the Black Cats are preparing for a new chapter.
